scope_verdict: GO — P1 Talent Dev / L&D sweet spot. Genuine professional-development/L&D program design: learning requirements analysis, attorney training programs/workshops/orientations, coaching, individual/group assessments, performance-review development, DEI/career-development initiatives, CLE compliance, Summer Associate Program management.
hard_stop_check: PASS — no explicit 'no sponsorship' clause; no ITAR/US-Person requirement; not clerical-primary (real L&D program work, not payroll/benefits/ER). Law firm = standard W-2 employer.
yoe: JD asks 3+ years L&D/professional services/legal — Jamie has ~3 yrs (within range, not a stretch).
preferred_gaps: JD 'preferred' items Jamie lacks: direct legal career-tracking/competency-modeling, multi-office law-firm PD experience. These are preferred-not-required and did not block.
application_method: Native LinkedIn Easy Apply (3 steps: Contact info -> Resume -> Review -> Submit). NOTE: JD body also says 'submit cover letter and resume by email to careers@kellerrohrback.com' — that email path was NOT used; the firm enabled LinkedIn Easy Apply as a native-accepted path, so submission went through Easy Apply (no autonomous email sent, per agent email-send restriction).
screening_questions: NONE. No work-authorization/sponsorship question, no YOE question, no free-text/essay. Clean 3-step flow.
